---
title: "About This Resource"
---

# About

This is a living statistical methods resource for INEG 2314H at [your institution].

## Design Philosophy

This resource is built on two frameworks:

**CPS Knowledge Structure** — every page is classified as a Construct (foundational quantity), Procedure (inferential technique), or Script (fixed-sequence workflow). See [knowledge-dimensions](references/knowledge-dimensions.md) for the theoretical grounding.

**LLM-Maintained Wiki** — the wiki is written and maintained incrementally by an AI agent from lecture slides, homework files, and R projects. See [llm-wiki](references/llm-wiki.md) for the architecture.

## How It Works

- The **wiki** (`wiki/`) is the conceptual backbone — markdown pages maintained by an LLM agent
- The **lessons** (`lessons/`) are polished Quarto documents combining prose, math, and executable R code
- The **dojo** (`dojo/`) is practice-focused: short R drills for building technical fluency
- The **maintenance** folder tracks the agent queue, change log, and link audits

## Instructor

Warren Ross
warren.r.ross@gmail.com
